label: Null Meridian Reliquary
description: The Null Meridian Reliquary is a compact storage chamber cut from the temple’s black crystalline strata and finished to a matte surface that swallows all spill of glare. Rectilinear shelving bays are machined directly into the walls, their edges beveled to the temple’s meridian angles and arranged as a strict grid that preserves orientation in absolute shadow. Seal-block plinths of faceted stone occupy the center line, each incised with lattice numerals and interval marks for inventory measured as angle and boundary. A single slit-aperture admits a fixed plane of dimness that renders the room’s contents legible by silhouette rather than reflection.
